permissions.name: theme.read
permissions.description: Read themes, presets, and token overrides for the tenant. Also gates the /me/theme-preference read.

permissions.name: theme.manage
permissions.description: CRUD on themes, presets, and token overrides. Design-role privilege — typically held by tenant owner + admin + explicit design-role users.

permissions.name: theme.activate
permissions.description: Flip a theme's is_active false → true. Separate from theme.manage because activation triggers CSS regen + notification fanout — some organisations restrict this to the owner even if design-role holds theme.manage.

permissions.name: platform.theme.read
permissions.description: Read platform-provided presets + cross-tenant custom preset usage stats.

permissions.name: platform.theme.manage-presets
permissions.description: CRUD on platform-provided ThemePreset rows (tenant_id = NULL). Academorix staff only. Every write triggers MigrateThemeTokensOnPresetUpdateJob for tenants referencing the preset.
